entry.title: IDC HSCG2306DARB001 (A00060) awarded to MARINETTE MARINE CORPORATION, was modified for the amount of $0

ns1:typeOfContractPricing.description: ORDER DEPENDENT (IDV ALLOWS PRICING ARRANGEMENT TO BE DETERMINED SEPARATELY FOR EACH ORDER)

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement: CORRECTION TO CHANGE MADE IN PREVIOUS CONTRACT MODIFICATION A00059 TO CONTRACT PART 1, THE SCHEDULE, SECTION B - SUPPLIES AND SERVICES AND PRICES. CORRECT STARTING HULL FOR CREDITS OWED THE GOVERNMENT TO READ HULL 45706 VICE 45627.

ns1:recoveredMaterialClauses.description: NO CLAUSES INCLUDED AND NO SUSTAINABILITY INCLUDED

THIS MODIFICATION ADDS SUB-CLIN 5003FP FOR ECP PARTIAL BOAT GROUPING LOT HULLS 98-115.
